authorityName.description: Name of the local authority (מועצה מקומית)

reportYear.description: Fiscal year of the financial statements

amountUnits.description: Units the amounts are stated in

totalAssets.description: Total assets at the report date for the current year (balance sheet)

totalLiabilitiesAndFunds.description: Total liabilities and funds at the report date for the current year (balance sheet)

totalBudgetReceipts.description: Grand total of regular-budget receipts for the actual current year (סה"כ תקבולים)

totalBudgetPayments.description: Grand total of regular-budget payments for the actual current year (סה"כ תשלומים)

balanceSheetLineItems.description: Balance-sheet line items (assets and liabilities) with both-year values

currentYearAmount.description: Amount for the current report year

budgetReceiptsByChapter.description: Regular-budget receipts by chapter (תקבולים) from the budget summary form

budgetAmount.description: Budgeted amount for the current year (תקציב)

actualCurrentYear.description: Actual amount for the current year (ביצוע)

actualPriorYear.description: Actual amount for the prior year (ביצוע)

budgetPaymentsByChapter.description: Regular-budget payments by chapter (תשלומים) from the budget summary form

budgetAmount.description: Budgeted amount for the current year (תקציב)

actualCurrentYear.description: Actual amount for the current year (ביצוע)

actualPriorYear.description: Actual amount for the prior year (ביצוע)
